---
name: RFC Comment (v1.0)
about: Comment on the Program AI Architecture Standard during the v1.0 comment period
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc-v1.0
---

**Which part of the standard?**
(Conformance point 1-10, a principle, the reference architecture, or "missing entirely")

**Your context**
(Industry, program scale, role - anonymized is fine. "PMO lead, $80M program, regulated financial services" is perfect.)

**The comment**
(What breaks, what's missing, or what's wrong - and why. Failure stories from real programs are the most valuable input.)

**Proposed change (optional)**
(If you have specific replacement language or a specific addition, put it here.)
